title: decaloba elliptica
intro: Decaloba elliptica, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Decaloba elliptica include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions and infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and overall well-being.
